name: Excalidraw
description: Open-source virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn diagrams. Collaborative, privacy-first, and works offline.

name: Raycast
description: Blazingly fast productivity launcher for macOS — search files, run scripts, manage clipboard, and extend with plugins.

name: Warp
description: A modern, Rust-based terminal with built-in AI assistance, command history search, and collaborative features.

name: Obsidian
description: A powerful knowledge base app that stores notes as plain Markdown. Local-first with a rich plugin ecosystem.

name: Bruno
description: An open-source API client designed for offline use — stores collections in plain text files in your repo.

name: Penpot
description: The open-source design and prototyping platform. Self-hostable alternative to Figma built for cross-team collaboration.

name: Hoppscotch
description: Open-source API development ecosystem — a lightweight, web-based alternative to Postman with real-time collaboration.

name: Zed
description: A high-performance code editor built in Rust — designed for speed and real-time collaboration with AI pair programming.
